g.text: Reduced World Bank agricultural value-added (current US$, log scale)
FABIO ISIC-A value-added aggregate (current US$, log scale)
One dot per country. Dashed line = identity (y = x). Point colour = forestry source of the reduced WB.
Log-log axes; the 5 largest economies and identity-line outliers are labelled.
FABIO ISIC-A value-added vs reduced World Bank agricultural VA [COMBINED_GLORIA], 2016
